context: Checkpoint 2026-05-01T03:34Z before likely compaction. Continued atomic CLI/host lane after user confirmed the CLI command should be named `refarm`. current_tasks: Latest commits before this handoff: 55622c40 `docs(cli): define refarm status output`; 3ec91804 `docs(cli): outline refarm distro focus`; 9e7bb585 `chore(project): checkpoint renderer consumer proofs`; 8420833a `refactor(app-me): advertise citizen web renderer`; ee6ab311 `refactor(app-dev): centralize studio renderer catalog`; 81c8f36f `feat(app-dev): add headless renderer snapshot`.

User confirmed: the CLI should be called `refarm`. Docs now assume future distro path `apps/refarm` unless a later product constraint forces rename. The product command/distro stays in `apps/`; packages remain reusable blocks.

3ec91804 added `docs/REFARM_CLI_DISTRO.md` and `docs/REFARM_WORK_FOCUS.md`. CLI distro doc defines the first boring command shape: `refarm web`, `refarm headless`, `refarm status`, `refarm doctor`; it keeps CLI UX/defaults/profiles/release packaging in `apps/refarm` and reusable runtime/render/trust/telemetry mechanics in packages. Work focus doc gives short/medium/long restart focus.

55622c40 added `docs/REFARM_STATUS_OUTPUT.md`, defining the initial canonical JSON shape for `refarm status --json`: schemaVersion, host, renderer, runtime, plugins, trust, streams, diagnostics. It also defines stable initial diagnostic string codes and says status must not depend on Astro, DOM, or TUI.
`.project/decisions.json` includes DEC-033: plan the `refarm` CLI as a docs-first distro in `apps/refarm` before scaffolding executable code. `docs/REFARM_HOST_MODEL.md` links the CLI distro doc.
Validation for docs slices: `npm run project:validate --silent` and `git diff --check` passed. No app/package build was necessary because changes were docs/board-only.
Current state before this handoff commit: `develop...origin/develop [ahead 40]`. Disk has dropped from ~14GB to ~13GB free, still 98% used.
